title: Viedma, Río Negro — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Viedma, Río Negro: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Viedma is a city in Río Negro with a population of 73,000. Río Negro’s capital on the Atlantic coast, proposed future capital of Argentina, with a growing administrative center.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
